title: stelis furfuracea
intro: Stelis furfuracea, also known as the fuzzy orchid, is a type of orchid plant species that belongs to the genus Stelis. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis furfuracea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Stelis furfuracea can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied and validated by medical professionals.
